lines: Mwunger’ udukunda,—Jy' uturagira, N'uduhora hafi,—Twatiny' iki se? Tugukurikire,Iy' ujya hose,
Mwunger' udukunda,—Tuz' ijwi ryawe, Uduhamagaye,—Turanezerwa Kand' iy’
Wavuy' amaraso,—Mwungeri mwiza, Kugira ngw intama—Uducungiire. Washyize kuri twe Ikimenyetso,Ni cyo Mwuka Wera,—Udutuyemo.
Mwunger' uturinde,—Uturengere Amasega mabi—Ye  kutwegera. Nta cy'
